meta.title: How much do America's air-launched missiles cost?!
meta.description:
Last week, people were surprised to learn just how expensive the AIM-9X used to down the Chinese balloon overflying the US really was, so here's a rundown on how much other missiles carried by American aircraft cost per unit. 
#shorts #airpower #f22 #f15 #f16 #f35 #missiles #missile
